title: Resource Library
body:
![Title Header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/XLhounCW/images/85d308fa51ef525732ba9e38a185da54e3690438.png)

This is only a Library mod, it does nothing on its own and not altering your Minecraft Gameplay

### Disclaimer
Because of limited time i only activly support 1.21.1 and the latest minor patch.
